alt: Editorial illustration showing the landscape of data-to-presentation tools, with spreadsheet forms flowing into a polished presentation deck
caption: The data-to-presentation category sits between analytics dashboards and AI slide generators. No single tool owns it yet.

alt: Editorial illustration comparing data analysis and slide design workflows, showing a split composition of numbers and charts versus styled presentation slides
caption: Data analysis starts with spreadsheets. Slide design starts with text. Different starting points, different tools.

alt: Editorial illustration of a CPG category review workflow, showing retail data flowing through analysis into a branded presentation deck
caption: CPG brand managers spend 20-30 hours per cycle building category review decks from syndicated data. The production phase takes 3-5x longer than the analysis.

alt: Editorial illustration comparing design-first and data-first presentation workflows, showing styled templates alongside computed chart outputs
caption: Beautiful.ai excels at design-first presentations. Data teams need a different starting point.

alt: Editorial illustration of a consulting engagement workflow, showing financial models and analysis transforming into client-ready presentation decks
caption: Strategy consulting firms spend 60-70% of project time on production. The analysis takes a fraction of the total hours.

alt: Editorial illustration showing six different approaches to converting Excel data into presentation slides, from manual to fully automated
caption: Six approaches to the Excel-to-slides workflow, ranging from manual copy-paste to AI-native automation.

alt: Editorial illustration comparing precision chart craftsmanship with full-pipeline deck automation, showing a detailed hand-crafted chart tool alongside an automated production line
caption: think-cell perfects one step of the workflow. The question is whether chart formatting is the bottleneck or total production time is.
